title: Pick of BL commodities -May 3, 2026
description: Last week, the India Meteorological Department (IMD) said El Nino, which is likely to emerge later this year, may last until January 2027. Latest assessments indicate that El Niño could surpass the intensity of the 2023 event. India’s Environment Ministry and the Indian Council of Agricultural Research have clarified that genetically modified rice is not grown in India, paving the way to take on China, which has rejected rice shipments for alleged presence of GMOs.
